channel.title: Manusha's Daily Drive
channel.description: A personalized daily briefing on AI, anime, and your favorite creators.

item.title: Jun 16, 2026 — Anthropic Pulls Claude Fable and Mythos AI Models After US Government Claims Jailbreak Risk
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Pulls Claude Fable and Mythos AI Models After US Government Claims Jailbreak Risk — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxPS0t6Wng3RzNPalVucXJsTWptTnhsNDF0VUI4M3ZjWTVjRUk5eTJNMmZvNE9aMjBRdXV6dWxfWFhVMkFEakhKM3dfTjFWY29VeG4zX3N4SkhhcTUtMnlpeVc4WlVvWmxVZnZyZEE5MHlqVmN1OFVZekRraGJKYUhkUkQtUnlaZVFRTjQ4ODZMa3poMDVVcjBJTXRJLTY2Zw?oc=5 Levels — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxQNnJfNlFpLVNhV3BhaEF3UHpQa3UzdW1zWmpXLTNrT0dvOG5qeFdQTXZkcDd6c0VuMF9HanozaWh3d09FUE11bXBwTjNyV2h5bFp5NHhJc0w5dUxEaTVpYTRzT215VE1tQ0JISkhhRl9vaWVIdjlGY1M3R1dNT0JVM3NrbWpQdlpJQ1VLVFliSmVKMHUzSFg4dWNPSFdIUWhqZ0FXQ3hqbkJOaDJZOUhwYlZxTEJOZnhGTEYtakdn0gG-AUFVX3lxTE5LWGxNWVhveEZfUTVVUDFWUFN5YUU2a0wxMUoyZk56ak5KT3JiTlk1Q21DR0dEcEdURlZnMjBTLWlIdHd2RkczYmxLa3VSSDdWNzVKVUUyRWJGa25BMFVuRm1PNFR5LUhxYjdFQlhjU1lTODl5cEx2bnE2NE5IQkxhZkpiOFY0NnAzdHdXTjZ4YjdYMFR1SVQ5YWNJUjFfcVJjeUFBNm4wTFU4LVFxb1RsYkhHQ282MzZiM21pZXc?oc=5 item.title: Jun 15, 2026 — US Government Slaps Export Controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos Models, Shutting Down Access Within Days of Launch
item.description: [AI] US Government Slaps Export Controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos Models, Shutting Down Access Within Days of Launch — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5 [AI] Zhipu AI's GLM-5.2 Open Surge: Stock Rockets 33% as Wall Street Bets on China AI After Anthropic Curbs — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI's Sam Altman Hints at IPO Within a Year and Teases Major AI Upgrade — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Meta's Alexandr Wang Bet Faces Reckoning: Zuckerberg Forced to Sell the New AI Model — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Nvidia Developing Dedicated AI Healthcare Model with Startup Abridge — item.title: Jun 14, 2026 — Anthropic disables Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models after U.S. export control order
item.description: [AI] Anthropic disables Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models after U.S. export control order — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Inside the White House's whirlwind decision to slap export controls on Anthropic — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] State Attorneys General investigate OpenAI as IPO looms — item.title: Jun 13, 2026 — Google DeepMind Releases Gemma 4 AI Models With Frontier-Level Reasoning, Multimodal Capabilities, and Extended Context Windows

item.title: Jun 12, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 Amid Safety and Backlash Drama

Aspar of the Star Chaser" — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE45VDZvN1VNcjFLTGo1bFptZTR2R3BvVVFRb1M5ME13VWJSdHJ6WWlTUmVLSzBhbWdhWVNNNU1QVkE5Q3l6d2RUZ2llSXBzazA0?oc=5 [Anime] New
